pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to hear him making coffee or just humming some song... but there's nothing. it's just this heavy, empty silence that follows me from room to room. i don't even know why i'm bothering to get out of bed anymore. what's the point of just... existing in a house that feels like a tomb?

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep field galaxies and it just hit me... how much of a joke everything is. like, we spend our whole lives stressing and hurting and trying to build something, but in the grand scheme of the universe, it’s literally zero. it's like we're just biological errors trying to find meaning in a void that doesn't even know we're here. it feels so pointless to even keep trying.

pool.baseline: i think i'm finally hitting a wall. everything i worked for in the lab... the last three years of funding, the data, it’s all just gone. it feels like i've built my entire life on nothing. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting for something that doesn't even want me back. i don't even know who i am without the research anymore. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of wax, and the silence of this manor is heavier than the stone walls themselves. He is gone... and with him, the very light of my soul has been extinguished. I look into the mirror and see not a woman, but a ghost already haunting her own life. There is no more music in the world, only this endless, grey ache. I feel as though I am drifting toward a great, dark sea, and I find myself wishing I could just... let the tide take me. To simply cease to be, amidst the velvet and the shadows.

pool.baseline: I was looking at my canvases today and i realized there's nothing left. It’s like the part of me that actually lived is just... gone. I'm just a hollow shape walking around. A shell. Without the art, i don't even know what 'i' am anymore. It feels like i'm just taking up space that used to belong to someone else.
